en: Children behave, that's what they say when we're together
ko: 아이들은 얌전히 해, 우리가 함께 있을 때 그렇게 말해

en: And watch how you play, they don't understand
ko: 놀 때 조심해, 그들은 이해하지 못해

en: And so we're running just as fast as we can
Holding on to one another's hand
Trying to get away into the night
And then you put your arms around me and we tumble to the ground
ko: 그때 네가 나를 안고 우리는 바닥에 넘어져

en: And then you say, I think we're alone now
ko: 그리고 네가 말해, 우리 이제 둘만 있는 것 같아

en: There doesn't seem to be anyone around

ko: 우리 이제 둘만 있는 것 같아

en: The beating of our hearts is the only sound
Look at the waves we are undoing
